mapper.insert: INSERT INTO analytics_view_share ( share_code_hash, share_code_plain, owner_user_id, source_view_id, report_key, snapshot_version, payload_json, audit_log_count, insight_count, owner_display_name, expires_at, max_imports, import_count, revoked ) VALUES ( #{shareCodeHash}, #{shareCodePlain}, #{ownerUserId}, #{sourceViewId}, #{reportKey}, #{snapshotVersion}, #{payloadJson}, #{auditLogCount}, #{insightCount}, #{ownerDisplayName}, #{expiresAt}, #{maxImports}, 0, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM analytics_view_share WHERE share_code_hash = #{shareCodeHash} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM analytics_view_share WHERE owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} AND source_view_id = #{sourceViewId} AND revoked = 0 AND expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
